deck.name: Golden Dawn Tarot
deck.system: Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn

majorArcana.name: The Fool
majorArcana.transliteration: Ruach Elohim - Spirit of the Living Gods

divinatory.upright: Idea, thought, spirituality, that which endeavours to transcend earth. The Fool represents the highest and most spiritual of ideas. Folly, expiation, wavering.
divinatory.reversed: Eccentricity, mania, delirium, carelessness, negligence, unwise action

symbolism: Mountaintop represents spiritual heights and Kether
White sun symbolizes superconsciousness and divine light
Dog or wolf represents animal nature under control
Precipice shows leap of faith into the unknown
Staff and wallet contain unmanifested potential
Path 11 connects Crown to Wisdom

majorArcana.name: The Magician

divinatory.upright: Skill, wisdom, adaptation, craft, cunning (sometimes in a bad sense). May indicate the Querent himself. Self-consciousness, will directed towards a purpose.
divinatory.reversed: Weakness of will, ineptitude, sickness, lack of imagination, mental disease

symbolism: Mercury rules communication and mental agility
Path 12 connects Crown to Understanding
Four elemental tools represent mastery
Yellow color represents intellect and consciousness
House (Beth) symbolizes vessel for consciousness

majorArcana.name: The High Priestess
majorArcana.transliteration: Gimel - The Camel, Bearer of Burdens

divinatory.upright: Secrets, mystery, the future as yet unrevealed. Wisdom, science, learning. The Moon as reflector of solar light. Change and alteration. Fluctuation between action and passion.
divinatory.reversed: Surface knowledge, conceit, moral or physical ardor without depth, passion ruling over reason

symbolism: Moon represents reflection and subconscious mind
Blue is color of Water and lunar influence
Path 13 connects Crown directly to Beauty/Heart
Veil conceals the mysteries of the inner temple
Camel carries wisdom across the desert of experience

majorArcana.name: The Empress

divinatory.upright: Fruitfulness, action, initiative. Door of Heaven, the Gateway of Life. Beauty, happiness, pleasure, success, luxury. Fertility and generation on all planes.
divinatory.reversed: Light uncertain, vacillation, inaction, lack of concentration, doubt, hesitation

symbolism: Venus governs love, beauty, and creative force
Emerald green represents growth and natural abundance
Path 14 unites Wisdom (Chokmah) with Understanding (Binah)
Door (Daleth) is gateway between spiritual and material
Crown of twelve stars represents zodiac and yearly cycles

majorArcana.name: The Emperor

divinatory.upright: War, conquest, victory, strife, ambition, originality. Realization, the Will in action. Male power and authority. Stability through force.
divinatory.reversed: Immaturity, ineffectiveness, weakness, loss of control, being overthrown, tyranny

symbolism: Aries is cardinal fire - initiating masculine force
Scarlet red represents blood, war, and vital energy
Path 15 channels Wisdom's force toward Beauty
Window (Heh) allows sight and vision of conquest
Ram symbolizes battering force and leadership

majorArcana.name: The Hierophant

divinatory.upright: Divine wisdom, manifestation, explanation, teaching. Occult force voluntarily invoked. The Inner Voice, intuition as teacher. Marriage, alliance.
divinatory.reversed: Over-kindness, weakness, foolish generosity, unorthodoxy, unconventionality taken too far

symbolism: Taurus is fixed earth - stability and material wisdom
Red orange combines fire and earth energies
Path 16 links Wisdom to Mercy and loving instruction
Nail (Vav) connects heaven and earth, fixing teaching
Bull represents steadfast endurance and fertility

majorArcana.name: The Lovers

divinatory.upright: Inspiration (passive), motive power and action arising from inspiration. Love, beauty, trials overcome. Equilibrium of opposites united. The power of analysis and discrimination.
divinatory.reversed: Unwise plans, failure to analyze, poor choices, temptation leading to trouble

symbolism: Gemini represents duality, twins, choice between paths
Orange blends red passion with yellow intellect
Path 17 descends from Understanding to Beauty through choice
Sword (Zain) cuts through illusion to discriminate truth
Union of masculine and feminine creates wholeness

majorArcana.name: The Chariot

divinatory.upright: Triumph, victory, overcoming opposition through control. The chariot of the spirit driving the body. Receptivity to higher forces. Protection through boundaries.
divinatory.reversed: Overthrow, loss of control, conquered by circumstances, defeat, vengeance miscarrying

symbolism: Cancer represents protective shell and emotional receptivity
Amber combines gold of sun with protection
Path 18 channels Understanding's force into Severity
Fence (Cheth) provides boundaries and sacred enclosure
Chariot represents controlled movement forward

majorArcana.name: Strength

divinatory.upright: Courage, strength, fortitude, power not arrested by matter. The serpent power (kundalini). Spiritual force overcoming material obstacles. Mastery through inner fire.
divinatory.reversed: Abuse of power, weakness, pettiness, sickness, disgrace, defeat through lack of courage

symbolism: Leo represents solar force, courage, and royal power
Greenish yellow shows living serpent energy
Path 19 balances Mercy and Severity through strength
Serpent (Teth) is kundalini force rising through chakras
Lion tamed by higher consciousness

majorArcana.name: The Hermit

divinatory.upright: Wisdom sought in solitude, the Hermit's lamp lights the way. Prudence, discretion, caution. Divine guidance. The Hand of God directing the seeker. Virginal purity of purpose.
divinatory.reversed: Over-caution, fear, concealment carried too far, lack of guidance, excessive isolation

symbolism: Virgo represents analysis, perfection, and purity
Yellowish green shows harvest wisdom and growth
Path 20 brings Mercy's grace to Beauty's heart
Yod is smallest letter, seed of creation, divine spark
Lamp illuminates the path for those below

majorArcana.name: Wheel of Fortune

divinatory.upright: Good fortune, success, elevation, luck, felicity. The cycles of manifestation. Jupiter's expansion and benevolence. The grasping of opportunity. Rotation of fate.
divinatory.reversed: Ill fortune, failure, unexpected bad luck, broken sequences, outside forces against you

symbolism: Jupiter brings expansion, luck, and beneficence
Violet combines red and blue - material and spiritual
Path 21 extends Mercy toward Victory
Palm (Kaph) grasps fortune or lets it slip away
Wheel represents eternal cycles and karma

majorArcana.name: Justice

divinatory.upright: Equilibrium, balance, justice. The eternal balance of positive and negative. Karma and karmic adjustment. The sword of severity tempered by the scales of mercy. Fair judgment.
divinatory.reversed: Injustice, false accusation, bigotry, bias, excessive severity or excessive mercy, imbalance

symbolism: Libra is the scales of perfect equilibrium
Emerald green represents Venus exalted in Libra
Path 22 brings Severity's judgment to Beauty's heart
Ox Goad (Lamed) teaches through discipline
Sword and scales balance mercy with severity

majorArcana.name: The Hanged Man

divinatory.upright: Enforced sacrifice, punishment, loss, suffering. The Dying God. Wisdom through sacrifice. Suspended between heaven and earth. Baptism by water, redemption through surrender.
divinatory.reversed: Selfishness, resistance to sacrifice, unwillingness to learn through suffering, false prophecy

symbolism: Water element represents emotions, intuition, flow
Deep blue is color of vast ocean depths
Path 23 descends from Severity to Intellect through sacrifice
Mem (Water) is the sea that drowns and baptizes
Inverted position shows reversal of normal perspective

majorArcana.name: Death

divinatory.upright: Transformation through death, time, age, destruction followed by renewal. The phoenix rising. Death of the old self. Putrefaction before regeneration. Scorpio's sting brings transformation.
divinatory.reversed: Fear of change, stagnation, partial change, slow transformation, resisting necessary endings

symbolism: Scorpio governs death, sex, transformation, occult
Green-blue represents deep waters of transformation
Path 24 transforms Beauty's light into Victory
Fish (Nun) swims in waters of unconscious
Skeleton represents what remains after dissolution

majorArcana.name: Temperance

divinatory.upright: Combination, mixing, coordination. The alchemical work. Tempering of opposites. The prop that supports the Great Work. Sagittarius aims the arrow of purpose. Art and management.
divinatory.reversed: Disunion, unfortunate combinations, competing interests, lack of coordination, failed experiments

symbolism: Sagittarius is the archer aiming toward higher truth
Blue represents Water ruling Sagittarius traditionally
Path 25 unites Beauty of heart with Foundation
Prop (Samekh) supports the alchemical vessel
Angel mixes fire and water in alchemical marriage

majorArcana.name: The Devil

divinatory.upright: Ravage, violence, force, fatality. The material binding spirit. Pan, the god of nature. The Eye that sees only matter. Capricorn's ambition for earthly power. Black magic and obsession.
divinatory.reversed: Release from bondage, overcoming materialism, spiritual awakening, seeing beyond illusion

symbolism: Capricorn represents earthly ambition and materialism
Indigo is deep darkness before spiritual sight
Path 26 tests Beauty through material temptation
Eye (Ayin) sees surface but may miss depths
Goat represents lusty animal nature and earthiness

majorArcana.name: The Tower

divinatory.upright: Catastrophe, sudden downfall, ruin. The Mouth of God speaking destruction. Mars energy breaking down false structures. The Tower of Babel. War, conflict, overthrow.
divinatory.reversed: Same in lesser degree, continued oppression, imprisonment in the ruins, tyranny

symbolism: Mars is god of war, destruction, violent force
Scarlet red represents blood and martial energy
Path 27 connects Victory to Glory through trial
Mouth (Peh) speaks the Word that destroys
Lightning strikes tower built on false foundations

majorArcana.name: The Star

divinatory.upright: Hope, faith, inspiration from above. The waters of cosmic consciousness poured forth. Aquarius the water-bearer. The hook that catches the star. Meditation and spiritual insight.
divinatory.reversed: Unfulfilled hope, pessimism, lack of vision, disconnection from higher source

symbolism: Aquarius pours living waters from the heavens
Violet combines red passion with blue spirit
Path 28 flows from Victory to Foundation
Fish Hook (Tzaddi) catches celestial wisdom
Naked figure represents spiritual transparency

majorArcana.name: The Moon
majorArcana.transliteration: Qoph - The Back of the Head

divinatory.upright: Deception, twilight, illusion, error. The back of the head - subconscious and hindbrain. Pisces swimming in opposite directions. Dreams, psychic impressions. Terror and nightmare. Evolution from water.
divinatory.reversed: Trifling deceptions, minor fears, imagination run wild, small mistakes

symbolism: Pisces represents dreams, dissolution, mysticism
Crimson suggests blood and primal waters
Path 29 descends from Victory to Kingdom through water
Back of Head (Qoph) is cerebellum and unconscious
Crustacean emerging from pool is early evolution

majorArcana.name: The Sun

divinatory.upright: Glory, gain, riches, triumph, pleasure, frankness, truth. The Head (Resh) crowned with solar consciousness. The Sun at zenith. Clarity, enlightenment. Success and happiness.
divinatory.reversed: Same qualities but in lesser degree, clouded success, future plans may fail

symbolism: Sun is source of life, light, and consciousness
Orange combines red vitality with yellow intellect
Path 30 illuminates the way from Glory to Foundation
Head (Resh) represents consciousness and reason
Solar force brings growth and manifestation

majorArcana.name: Judgement

divinatory.upright: Final decision, judgment, sentence. Renewal, resurrection. The Fire of Spirit awakening the dead. The Tooth that devours time. Aeon ending and new Aeon beginning. Awakening to higher consciousness.
divinatory.reversed: Weakness, indecision, delay of judgment, failure to awaken, resisting the call

symbolism: Fire element represents spirit and transformation
Orange-scarlet is flame of spiritual awakening
Path 31 brings fire from Intellect to Earth
Shin is triple flame of divine fire
Tooth (Shin) devours the old to birth the new

majorArcana.name: The World

divinatory.upright: Completion, perfection, the end matter. The World as complete manifestation. Saturn's administrative completion. The Cross as union of opposites. Cosmic consciousness embodied. Success, assurance.
divinatory.reversed: Imperfection, failure to complete, stagnation, inertia, refusal of cosmic consciousness

symbolism: Saturn represents time, limits, completion, manifestation
Indigo is deep cosmic darkness containing all
Path 32 grounds Foundation into Kingdom/Earth
Tav (Cross) marks completion of alphabet and creation
Wreath encircles the dancer at center of cosmos
